title: Thai Crunchy Rice Bowl
description: A fusion dish combining crunchy Italian rice with Thai flavors, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. Serve as a base with your favorite Thai toppings.
instructions: 1. Heat the peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the crushed lasagna and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the Thai chili flakes and stir to combine.
4. Add the crunchy Italian rice and stir to combine with the lasagna mixture.
5. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is lightly toasted.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce (if using) and lime juice.
7. Pour the sauce over the rice mixture and stir to combine.
8. Transfer the rice mixture to a serving bowl and top with chopped cilantro.
